title: Living in Boulder vlog 12 - 13 - 18: 100 Miles a day for 15 days, getting worn out

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder Vlog. It's 8.52 p.m. I was just talking for 12 minutes, and then I looked at this thing to sit stop in the video, and it froze at 3.52, so I figured I'd re-record the video instead of just upload what I had, because I did that last week.
I was just talking, and then it stopped at 3.52, and I was in the middle of something, and I don't think that's professional, so I'll just redo the video.
The problem was I didn't restart the computer. After my streaming, I do streaming with this computer, and then I go and I, yeah, and then I forgot to restart it.
I think I should restart it, because it would freeze and crack, you know. It's kind of a strain, I think, to do the streaming for so long, so that's why it froze, I think, with QuickTime.

Somebody said I should use a different program than QuickTime to record my videos. I want to figure out how to do it with my cell phone. I'm sure my iPhone 10 can do it. I'm just too tired all the time.
So, okay, I'll just make this one really brief. I hate doing videos twice. It drives me crazy.

So, yesterday, I felt good, because my energy level was good, but then I realized during the ride that my legs were tired, were sore, filled with lactic acid, and that drug me, my energy level down, and I ended up doing a faster ride, though.
I went, last three days were faster, but today's going to be slower. Today's going to be at 625, probably, because I was tired all day, so I'm tired, but also my legs are filled with lactic acid.
It's the two, the double whammy. So, plus I don't have goo. I'm living off of, like, power bars. I mean, tiger milk bars and cliff bars now.
So, I'm, and I could only eat half of my Subway sandwich. I got a foot long, so maybe I'll eat that during the ride.
This morning, I had a breakfast burrito combo at Taco Bell, because I was up until, like, 830 with Insomnia.

I was working on my, not Insomnia, I was just, that's just my schedule, but I was working on organizing files on my computer, and then I slept all day, so until, like, 630, and then I was cleaning my house and stuff.
So, today, yeah, today is going to be a, basically, a suffer fest, physically, but mentally, I'm in heaven, because this is my computer.
I love checking out the computer, looking at stuff.
You know, I have a whole lot that I have to catch up on. Like, I love watching the bike racer videos, getting back into bike racer world.
I haven't really ever watched. I was never a fan of bike racing. I watched Twitter France and stuff in the mid-80s, but that was pretty much it.
So, everything's new. I'm watching, I could watch every video for the first time, and same thing with music videos and all sorts of other stuff.
So, I haven't gotten bored with just diddle-dowling around and doing bike race videos and music videos and listening to music.
So, um, um, but yeah, that's probably what I'll do the rest of the month.
And then I'm going to quit smoking weed after 30 days of this.
Um, so, uh, yeah, okay, so that's enough talking. I gotta get going. It's 8.56. Later.
Later.
Later.
Later.
